launch_policy.public_launch_means: Feature can be exposed with its launch-mode label.
launch_policy.filing_grade_auto_means: Exact official machine-readable source can be used without a tariff-line parser warning.
launch_policy.guardrail: Hybrid and monitor modes must not be marketed as fully automatic filing-grade rates.

duty_rate_health_board.headline: 1 official exact market(s), 6 hybrid official market(s), 6 maintained exact-map market(s).

duty_rates.name: United States HTS / USITC
duty_rates.current_scope: General HTS base duty for maintained HS prefixes. Additional duties such as Section 301 and AD/CVD remain separate benchmark/scope checks.
duty_rates.next_action: Keep USITC sync running before releases and monitor changes in data/duty-rates.json.
duty_rates.public_claim: Filing-grade auto for maintained HS prefixes
duty_rates.next_upgrade: Monitor upstream schema and add scope layers such as trade remedies separately.
duty_rates.label: Live auto
duty_rates.note: Official machine-readable source is connected to daily sync.

duty_rates.name: China import tariff / VAT
parser_subtasks: Map exact 8/10-digit China Customs tariff rows for priority high-tech HS lines such as 854231, 847150, 850760, and 9018.
Separate MFN duty, preferential-origin duty, import VAT, consumption tax, and license/control flags before filing-grade promotion.
Block promotion when one HS prefix maps to multiple tax rates or product-control notes.
rate_change_drivers: MFN duty, preferential-origin duty, or import VAT changes
CCC, SRRC, dual-use, or other product-control overlays
duty_rates.current_scope: Maintained China exact-line MFN duty candidates plus 13% import VAT and product-control review reminders.
duty_rates.next_action: Replace local exact map with machine-readable China Customs tariff parser output when available; keep VAT and product-control checks refreshed.
duty_rates.automation_claim: Maintained exact-line map refreshed by source roadmap
duty_rates.public_claim: Maintained exact candidates; not fully machine-parsed
duty_rates.next_upgrade: Connect a machine-readable CN tariff parser or official API.
duty_rates.label: Live hybrid
duty_rates.note: Official-linked or maintained exact map is live; exact tariff-line scope stays gated where needed.

duty_rates.name: Germany import VAT with EU TARIC duty
source_use_cases: Germany import VAT plus EU TARIC duty pre-check
EU-bound direct and transit route pricing
parser_subtasks: Resolve exact TARIC code against EU duty rows before applying Germany-specific VAT as a separate tax layer.
Preserve Germany VAT treatment separately from EU customs duty so Post-Entry math does not overstate base duty certainty.
Flag ambiguous EU TARIC prefixes as exact-code required instead of promoting them to filing-grade rates.
rate_change_drivers: EU trade-remedy or suspension changes affecting Germany entries
duty_rates.current_scope: Hybrid Germany coverage: official TARIC candidate duty where unambiguous, TARIC scope-check where exact code is needed, and Germany VAT benchmark separately.
duty_rates.next_action: Keep using EU TARIC updater; next upgrade is exact TARIC-code input so ambiguous prefixes can resolve to one official rate.
duty_rates.automation_claim: Official parser candidate with exact-code gates
duty_rates.public_claim: Hybrid official coverage; exact tariff-line scope stays gated
duty_rates.next_upgrade: Add exact tariff-code input and promote only unambiguous official rows.
duty_rates.label: Live hybrid
duty_rates.note: Official-linked or maintained exact map is live; exact tariff-line scope stays gated where needed.

duty_rates.name: EU TARIC
source_use_cases: EU-bound direct and transit route pricing
parser_subtasks: Accept exact 8/10-digit TARIC code input and normalize spaces, dots, and national suffixes before lookup.
Map ERGA OMNES third-country duty rows to official base duty only when one active measure applies for the entry date.
Keep VAT, anti-dumping, countervailing, quota, and suspension layers outside the base-duty parser until separately sourced.
rate_change_drivers: Suspensions, quotas, anti-dumping, or countervailing duty updates
duty_rates.current_scope: Hybrid EU coverage: official TARIC candidate duty for unambiguous HS prefixes, scope-check status for ambiguous prefixes, and benchmark member-state VAT shown separately.
duty_rates.next_action: Continue TARIC workbook sync; promote only prefixes with one unambiguous ERGA OMNES third-country-duty rate and keep ambiguous prefixes exact-code gated.
duty_rates.automation_claim: Official parser candidate with exact-code gates
duty_rates.public_claim: Hybrid official coverage; exact tariff-line scope stays gated
duty_rates.next_upgrade: Add exact tariff-code input and promote only unambiguous official rows.
duty_rates.label: Live hybrid
duty_rates.note: Official-linked or maintained exact map is live; exact tariff-line scope stays gated where needed.

duty_rates.name: India Customs Tariff / ICEGATE CIP
source_use_cases: India import duty, SWS, and IGST pre-check
semiconductor, electronics, and telecom import route pricing
BIS/QCO, WPC, and SCOMET scope review
parser_subtasks: Parse exact HSN rows from ICEGATE/CIP or official tariff data and split BCD, SWS, IGST, and exemption layers.
Keep BIS/QCO, WPC, SCOMET, and electronics product-control checks separate from duty-rate math.
Gate promotion where exemption notifications or effective-date conditions change the payable rate.
rate_change_drivers: India Customs tariff or exemption notification changes
BIS/QCO, WPC, or SCOMET product-control updates
duty_rates.current_scope: Official-live probe candidate plus maintained exact-line BCD fallback; SWS/IGST and product-control review reminders stay separate.
duty_rates.next_action: Promote ICEGATE/CIP parser output only where one unambiguous BCD/SWS/IGST row is found; keep exemption, IGST, BIS/QCO, WPC, and product-control checks refreshed.
duty_rates.automation_claim: Official source probe wired; parser promotion still gated
duty_rates.public_claim: Official-linked candidate coverage with parser caveat
duty_rates.next_upgrade: Replace maintained candidates with verified official parser output where unambiguous.
duty_rates.label: Live hybrid
duty_rates.note: Official-linked or maintained exact map is live; exact tariff-line scope stays gated where needed.

duty_rates.name: Japan Customs tariff
parser_subtasks: Parse Japan Customs tariff schedule rows by exact statistical code for high-tech HS lines.
Keep customs duty, consumption tax, and any temporary tariff measure as separate rate layers.
Gate promotion when one HS prefix maps to multiple statistical-code rates or product-scope notes.
duty_rates.current_scope: Maintained Japan exact-line base-duty candidates plus 10% consumption-tax value treatment reminder.
duty_rates.next_action: Keep Japan Customs chapter parser running daily; preserve statistical-code gates for mixed-rate prefixes and consumption-tax separation.
duty_rates.automation_claim: Official source probe wired; parser promotion still gated
duty_rates.public_claim: Official-linked candidate coverage with parser caveat
duty_rates.next_upgrade: Replace maintained candidates with verified official parser output where unambiguous.
duty_rates.label: Live hybrid
duty_rates.note: Official-linked or maintained exact map is live; exact tariff-line scope stays gated where needed.

duty_rates.name: Korea Customs tariff / VAT
source_use_cases: Korea import duty and VAT pre-check
parser_subtasks: Parse KCS 10-digit tariff rows and normalize Korean/English tariff descriptions for maintained high-tech HS lines.
Separate customs duty, VAT, FTA/preferential-origin treatment, and KC/KCC product approval checks.
Treat official source responses with zero parsed rows as parser-selector gaps, not generic network failures.
rate_change_drivers: KC/KCC certification or electronics safety scope changes
duty_rates.current_scope: Maintained Korea exact-line base-duty candidates plus 10% VAT and KC/origin review reminders.
duty_rates.next_action: Replace local exact map with KCS 10-digit parser output where unambiguous; keep exact-HS gates for mixed-rate rows.
duty_rates.automation_claim: Official source probe wired; parser promotion still gated
duty_rates.public_claim: Official-linked candidate coverage with parser caveat
duty_rates.next_upgrade: Replace maintained candidates with verified official parser output where unambiguous.
duty_rates.label: Live hybrid
duty_rates.note: Official-linked or maintained exact map is live; exact tariff-line scope stays gated where needed.

duty_rates.name: Mexico tariff / VAT
parser_subtasks: Parse TIGIE/NICO exact tariff rows for high-tech HS lines and keep NICO subheading scope explicit.
Separate IGI duty, VAT, NOM certification, and preferential-origin treatment before promoting filing-grade results.
Flag routes where USMCA or other origin-transformation evidence is required before cost comparison.
duty_rates.current_scope: Maintained Mexico exact-line IGI/base-duty candidates plus 16% VAT and NOM/origin review reminders.
duty_rates.next_action: Replace local exact map with a machine-readable TIGIE/NICO parser when available; keep VAT, NOM, and preferential-origin checks refreshed.
duty_rates.automation_claim: Maintained exact-line map refreshed by source roadmap
duty_rates.public_claim: Maintained exact candidates; not fully machine-parsed
duty_rates.next_upgrade: Connect a machine-readable MX tariff parser or official API.
duty_rates.label: Live hybrid
duty_rates.note: Official-linked or maintained exact map is live; exact tariff-line scope stays gated where needed.

duty_rates.name: Malaysia Customs SST / duty
parser_subtasks: Parse exact Malaysia HS/AHTN rows from Royal Malaysian Customs or SST sources for priority high-tech product lines.
Keep import duty, SST, exemptions, SIRIM/MCMC/ST approval, and preferential-origin treatment as separate decision layers.
Gate transit recommendations until first-leg and second-leg duty, origin transformation, and anti-circumvention evidence are all checked.
rate_change_drivers: Malaysia tariff or SST schedule updates
duty_rates.current_scope: Maintained Malaysia exact-line base-duty candidates plus SST/exemption and product-approval review reminders.
duty_rates.next_action: Use official probe status to promote a Royal Malaysian Customs/SST parser only after exact HS rows are machine-readable; keep SST, exemptions, SIRIM/MCMC/ST, and transit evidence separately refreshed.
duty_rates.automation_claim: Maintained exact-line map refreshed by source roadmap
duty_rates.public_claim: Maintained exact candidates; not fully machine-parsed
duty_rates.next_upgrade: Connect a machine-readable MY tariff parser or official API.
duty_rates.label: Live hybrid
duty_rates.note: Official-linked or maintained exact map is live; exact tariff-line scope stays gated where needed.

duty_rates.name: Netherlands import VAT with EU TARIC duty
source_use_cases: Netherlands import VAT plus EU TARIC duty pre-check
EU-bound direct and transit route pricing
parser_subtasks: Resolve exact TARIC code against EU duty rows before applying Netherlands-specific VAT as a separate tax layer.
Keep Dutch VAT and import VAT accounting separate from EU base-duty parser output.
Flag ambiguous EU TARIC prefixes as exact-code required before using the route in pricing comparison.
rate_change_drivers: EU trade-remedy or suspension changes affecting Netherlands entries
duty_rates.current_scope: Hybrid Netherlands coverage: official TARIC candidate duty where unambiguous, TARIC scope-check where exact code is needed, and Netherlands VAT benchmark separately.
duty_rates.next_action: Keep using EU TARIC updater; next upgrade is exact TARIC-code input so ambiguous prefixes can resolve to one official rate.
duty_rates.automation_claim: Official parser candidate with exact-code gates

duty_rates.name: Singapore Customs duties and GST
source_use_cases: Singapore import duty and GST pre-check
origin transformation and re-export evidence review
parser_subtasks: Parse exact Singapore HS/AHTN rows for maintained high-tech product lines before promoting filing-grade duty output.
Keep GST, import relief, strategic-goods, telecom, and controlled-goods checks outside the base-duty parser.
Require origin transformation and re-export evidence before treating Singapore as a cost-saving transit route.
rate_change_drivers: Singapore Customs dutiable-goods or tariff schedule updates
Strategic Goods Control, IMDA, or controlled-goods scope changes
duty_rates.current_scope: Maintained Singapore exact-line base-duty candidates plus 9% GST value treatment reminder.
duty_rates.next_action: Replace local exact map with machine-readable TradeNet/AHTN parser when available; keep GST separately refreshed.
duty_rates.automation_claim: Maintained exact-line map refreshed by source roadmap
duty_rates.public_claim: Maintained exact candidates; not fully machine-parsed

duty_rates.label: Live hybrid
duty_rates.note: Official-linked or maintained exact map is live; exact tariff-line scope stays gated where needed.

duty_rates.name: Taiwan Customs tariff / business tax
source_use_cases: Taiwan import duty and business-tax pre-check
BSMI/NCC product inspection and telecom approval review
parser_subtasks: Parse exact Taiwan Customs tariff rows for maintained high-tech HS lines before promoting official base-duty output.
Separate customs duty, business tax, commodity inspection, NCC telecom approval, and origin preference into distinct layers.
Flag mixed-rate tariff prefixes as exact-code required instead of using broad heading-level estimates.
rate_change_drivers: Business tax or import tax treatment changes
duty_rates.current_scope: Maintained Taiwan exact-line base-duty candidates plus 5% business-tax and product-scope review reminders.
duty_rates.next_action: Replace local exact map with machine-readable Taiwan Customs tariff parser when available; keep business tax and product inspection checks refreshed.

duty_rates.label: Live hybrid
duty_rates.note: Official-linked or maintained exact map is live; exact tariff-line scope stays gated where needed.

duty_rates.name: Vietnam Customs tariff / VAT
parser_subtasks: Parse exact Vietnam HS/AHTN rows for priority high-tech lines and preserve preferential-origin duty separately from ordinary MFN duty.
Keep VAT, import licensing, MIC/ICT product approval, battery safety, and origin-transformation evidence outside the base-duty parser.
Gate transit recommendations until the second-leg duty, origin transformation, and anti-circumvention evidence are checked together.
rate_change_drivers: Vietnam Customs tariff or preferential-origin duty updates
VAT or import tax layer changes
ICT approval, energy-efficiency, battery safety, or origin evidence changes
duty_rates.current_scope: Maintained Vietnam exact-line base-duty candidates plus VAT/preferential-origin review for electronics.
duty_rates.next_action: Use official probe status to promote a Vietnam Customs/VNACCS parser only after exact HS rows are machine-readable; keep VAT, origin scope, and transit evidence separately refreshed.
duty_rates.automation_claim: Maintained exact-line map refreshed by source roadmap
duty_rates.public_claim: Maintained exact candidates; not fully machine-parsed
duty_rates.next_upgrade: Connect a machine-readable VN tariff parser or official API.
duty_rates.label: Live hybrid
duty_rates.note: Official-linked or maintained exact map is live; exact tariff-line scope stays gated where needed.

duty_rates.name: Russia / EAEU tariff and VAT
parser_subtasks: Connect exact EAEU tariff-line rows before using Russia rates for pricing or post-entry math.
Keep ordinary customs duty, VAT, sanctions, export-control, and restricted-party screening as separate gates.
Block opportunity or transit recommendations where sanctions or controlled-technology restrictions override duty savings.
rate_change_drivers: EAEU tariff schedule or VAT changes
Russia sanctions, restricted-party, or export-control updates
Import licensing or controlled-technology scope changes
duty_rates.current_scope: Official-link monitored EAEU duty/VAT screening plus sanctions and restricted-party scope warning.
duty_rates.next_action: Connect an exact EAEU/Russia tariff-line parser; keep sanctions and restricted-party scope flags separate from ordinary duty math.
duty_rates.public_claim: Source monitored; do not show as automated rate extraction
duty_rates.next_upgrade: Connect exact tariff-line parser before using rate math beyond screening.
duty_rates.label: Live monitor
duty_rates.note: Official source is monitored, but exact machine-readable parsing is not live yet.
